defaultDescription: Transform your mind through voice and sacred frequencies

descriptions.home: waQup — Create personalised affirmations, meditations, and rituals in your own voice. Practice free forever.
descriptions.howItWorks: See how waQup works: tell the AI your intention, create in your voice, and transform through daily practice. Three steps. No subscriptions for replay.
descriptions.investors: waQup for founding partners — revenue share, no equity dilution. Voice-first transformation platform with clear unit economics.
descriptions.ourStory: Why we built waQup — the founder story behind voice-first affirmations, meditations, and rituals.
descriptions.theScience: The science behind waQup: neuroplasticity, voice memory, and subconscious reprogramming.
descriptions.forTeachers: waQup for teachers and coaches — bring personalised voice practices to your students and clients.
descriptions.forCoaches: waQup for coaches — share private voice practices with clients. Create in minutes, not hours.
descriptions.forCreators: waQup for creators — earn from your content. Your voice, your brand, revenue share.
descriptions.forStudios: waQup for studios — scale voice-first practices. QR codes, in-class access, referral credits.
descriptions.pricing: Simple, transparent pricing. Practice is always free. Credits only for creation.
descriptions.funnels: waQup sales funnels and conversion flows for marketing.
descriptions.launch: waQup is live. Your voice. Your practice. Your transformation.
descriptions.getQs: Get Qs — credit packs to power your creation journey. Practice free forever.
descriptions.join: Join as a Founding Member. Early access, best terms, help shape waQup.
descriptions.waitlist: Join the waQup waitlist. Early access, no card required, practice free always.
descriptions.comingSoon: waQup is coming soon. Join the waitlist for early access.
descriptions.terms: Terms of Service governing use of waQup. Read our legal terms.
descriptions.privacy: How waQup collects, uses, and protects your data. Privacy Policy.
descriptions.dataDeletion: How to request deletion of your data from waQup.
